curation_notes: Locations derived directly from the patch diff. The patch adds nil checks for AuthenticationFailureParameter in handleAuthenticationFailure and AuthenticationResponseParameter in handleAuthenticationResponse. Both are in internal/amf/nas/gmm/. Sibling handler files (handle_registration_request.go, handle_service_request.go, etc.) were checked but do not exhibit the same nil-dereference pattern for authentication IE parameters. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed: CWE-476 maps directly and the fix is adding nil pointer checks before dereferencing.
